{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032313595448A2FF6D417F9AD64731"}"},"total":395},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7350268993201521470","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有书友评论路人小角色戏份太多，但我觉得很好，非常细致描述末世下的芸芸众生。而且300章了，还没有什么修仙玄幻、丧尸怪兽的情节，相对正常的末世文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711416072,"group_id":"7217061806232046648","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/U+cefk8hoyq5rUW89G17E=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"98432883469","user_name":"爱吃蔚州贡米的罗铿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98432883469","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7217061806232046648","book_info":{"abstract":"全球进入冰河时代，将会有99%的人会被冻死。
林洛因为女友背叛，惨死在女友姘头的手里。
老天给他一次重生的机会，这次林洛不仅要活下去，还要报仇。
需要大量物资？他直接掏空了几十个超市的大仓库。
怕冷？他建造了一个堪比超级堡垒的安全屋！
在这冰河末世，每个人为了活下去，展现出人性最恶的一面。
林洛吸取了上一世的经验，知道物资多么重要和人性有多么坏。
